goal: Send freee invoice for e-signature via CloudSign
description: Generate an invoice in freee, attach it to a CloudSign envelope for client e-signature, and update freee status once signed.

steps.action: Create invoice with line items and export as PDF
steps.error_hint: Ensure invoice qualified-invoice format (適格請求書) is enabled for Invoice System compliance

steps.action: Create envelope with invoice PDF and set signer email
steps.error_hint: CloudSign free plan limits to 5 documents/month. Check plan quota before sending

steps.action: Update invoice status to 'sent' and attach CloudSign envelope reference
steps.error_hint: freee API rate limit is 3000 req/hour per company. Batch updates if processing multiple invoices

goal: Sync SmartHR employee data to freee for payroll accounting
description: Pull employee salary and deduction data from SmartHR and create monthly payroll journal entries in freee accounting.

steps.action: Export monthly payroll summary including base salary, overtime, and social insurance deductions
steps.error_hint: SmartHR payroll API requires 'payroll' scope. Ensure OAuth token has correct permissions

steps.action: Create journal entries for salary expense, social insurance, and withholding tax
steps.error_hint: Map SmartHR deduction categories to freee account codes. 法定福利費 and 給与手当 accounts must exist

steps.action: Notify finance team that payroll journals have been posted

input_mapping.message: Payroll for {{year_month}}: {{employee_count}} entries posted to freee

steps.error_hint: Slack bot must be invited to the target channel first

goal: Auto-generate freee invoice from closed Salesforce deal
description: When a Salesforce opportunity is marked 'Closed Won', automatically create a corresponding invoice in freee accounting.

steps.action: Retrieve closed-won opportunity details including amount, account, and line items
steps.error_hint: Salesforce API version must be v55.0+. Check that opportunity has associated products

steps.action: Create invoice from opportunity data with proper tax calculation
steps.error_hint: freee client (取引先) must exist first. Use partner API to auto-create if missing

steps.action: Update opportunity with freee invoice ID in custom field
steps.error_hint: Custom field 'freee_invoice_id__c' must be created in Salesforce schema first

goal: Notify Chatwork room on Salesforce deal stage changes
description: Monitor Salesforce opportunity stage changes and post updates to the relevant Chatwork sales room.

steps.action: Detect opportunity stage change via webhook or polling
steps.error_hint: Salesforce Outbound Messages require HTTPS endpoint. Use Platform Events for real-time

steps.action: Post deal update to sales team room with stage and amount
steps.error_hint: Chatwork message formatting uses [info][title] tags, not Markdown. Max 5000 chars

goal: Route new Salesforce leads to Slack channels by region
description: When a new lead is created in Salesforce, route notification to the appropriate regional Slack channel based on prefecture.

steps.action: Capture new lead creation with company, prefecture, and source
steps.error_hint: Ensure Lead trigger is active. Check Salesforce deployment status if webhook not firing

steps.action: Post lead details to region-specific sales channel
steps.error_hint: Slack Block Kit JSON must be valid. Test with Block Kit Builder before deploying

steps.action: Assign lead owner based on region routing rules
steps.error_hint: Lead assignment rules may conflict with Apex triggers. Check order of execution

goal: Sync marketing qualified leads from Marketo to Salesforce
description: When a lead reaches MQL score threshold in Marketo, sync to Salesforce with full activity history and campaign attribution.

steps.action: Identify leads that crossed MQL score threshold and export with activity log
steps.error_hint: Marketo REST API daily quota is 10,000 calls. Use bulk extract API for large batches

steps.action: Create or update leads with Marketo data and campaign attribution
steps.error_hint: Salesforce duplicate rules may block creation. Use upsert with email as external ID

steps.action: Notify sales team of new MQLs with lead scores and top activities
steps.error_hint: Batch notifications to avoid Slack rate limit (1 msg/sec per channel)

goal: Track SendGrid email engagement in HubSpot CRM
description: Sync SendGrid email open/click events back to HubSpot contact timeline for sales follow-up prioritization.

steps.action: Receive email engagement webhook events (opens, clicks, bounces)
steps.error_hint: SendGrid Event Webhook must be configured with signed verification. Check webhook URL is publicly accessible

steps.action: Find contact by email and log engagement event on timeline
steps.error_hint: HubSpot timeline event API requires custom event type to be registered first in settings

goal: Capture SATORI anonymous-to-known conversions in kintone
description: When an anonymous visitor identifies themselves via SATORI form, create a lead record in kintone CRM app with browsing history.

steps.action: Detect form submission and retrieve visitor's page view history
steps.error_hint: SATORI webhook payload format varies by form type. Test with actual form submission

steps.action: Create lead record in CRM app with visitor data and browsing behavior summary
steps.error_hint: kintone app field codes are case-sensitive. Verify field code mapping matches app schema

steps.action: Notify sales team of new identified lead with interest signals
steps.error_hint: Chatwork API token expires if user changes password. Monitor for 401 errors

goal: Send segmented email campaigns via SendGrid using b→dash segments
description: Export customer segments from b→dash CDP and trigger targeted email campaigns through SendGrid.

steps.action: Export customer segment with email addresses and personalization attributes
steps.error_hint: b→dash segment export may take time for large segments. Use async export for 10k+ contacts

steps.action: Upload contacts to marketing list and trigger single send campaign
steps.error_hint: SendGrid marketing contacts have separate pricing. Check contact tier limit before upload

steps.action: Report campaign launch status to marketing channel
steps.error_hint: Include campaign_id in notification for easy tracking

goal: Sync Stripe recurring subscription payments to freee
description: When Stripe processes a subscription renewal payment, automatically create a sales journal entry in freee with proper revenue recognition.

steps.action: Receive invoice.paid webhook for subscription renewal
steps.error_hint: Stripe webhook signature verification requires endpoint secret. Set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var

steps.action: Create revenue journal entry with payment reference and tax breakdown
steps.error_hint: Stripe amounts are in JPY (no decimals). Ensure freee tax-inclusive calculation matches

goal: Sync Square daily sales summary to MoneyForward
description: Aggregate Square POS daily transactions and post summary journal entry to MoneyForward Cloud accounting.

steps.action: Retrieve daily transaction summary with payment method breakdown
steps.error_hint: Square API uses UTC timestamps. Convert to JST (UTC+9) for date boundaries

steps.action: Post daily sales journal with separate entries for cash, card, and e-money
steps.error_hint: MoneyForward requires debit/credit balance. Split card fees into 支払手数料 account

goal: Post Smaregi POS sales data to freee as journal entries
description: Pull daily POS transaction data from Smaregi and create accounting journal entries in freee with category breakdown.

steps.action: Export daily sales by product category and payment method
steps.error_hint: Smaregi API uses contract-specific subdomain. Ensure base URL includes contract ID

steps.action: Create journal entry with category-level revenue accounts
steps.error_hint: Map Smaregi product categories to freee account items (勘定科目). Create mapping table in advance

steps.action: Post daily sales report to store operations channel
steps.error_hint: Format JPY amounts with comma separators for readability

goal: Escalate high-priority Zendesk tickets to Slack
description: When a Zendesk ticket is marked urgent or has been unresolved beyond SLA, escalate to the engineering Slack channel.

steps.action: Detect ticket priority change to urgent or SLA breach trigger
steps.error_hint: Zendesk webhook triggers require Admin role. Test with Zendesk webhook tester tool

steps.action: Post escalation alert with ticket details and direct link to Zendesk
steps.error_hint: Use Slack Block Kit for rich formatting. Include assignee mention using Slack user ID mapping

goal: Log Intercom conversations to kintone for analysis
description: When an Intercom conversation is closed, create a support case record in kintone with conversation summary and resolution.

steps.action: Capture conversation closure event with full message history and tags
steps.error_hint: Intercom webhook payload can be large. Filter to conversation.closed topic only

steps.action: Create support case record with conversation details, tags, and satisfaction rating
steps.error_hint: kintone text field max is 64KB. Truncate long conversation histories

goal: Sync Channel Talk customer data to HubSpot contacts
description: When a Channel Talk user profile is updated or a chat is completed, sync customer information and chat history to HubSpot.

steps.action: Export user profile update or chat completion with customer attributes
steps.error_hint: Channel Talk API uses different auth for front/back API. Use back API key for server-side calls

steps.action: Create or update contact with Channel Talk attributes and last chat timestamp
steps.error_hint: HubSpot property names must be lowercase with underscores. Create custom properties first via API

steps.action: Create engagement note with chat summary on contact timeline
steps.error_hint: HubSpot engagement API v3 uses 'notes' endpoint. Older v1 engagement API is deprecated

goal: Send Tableau dashboard alerts to Slack
description: When a Tableau metric crosses a threshold, capture a dashboard snapshot and post it to the relevant Slack channel.

steps.action: Detect data-driven alert trigger and export dashboard view as image
steps.error_hint: Tableau Server REST API requires PAT (Personal Access Token). Token expires after 1 year

steps.action: Post alert with dashboard image and current metric values
steps.error_hint: Slack file upload API requires files:write scope. Image must be under 20MB

goal: Auto-generate weekly KPI report from Looker to kintone
description: Run a scheduled Looker Look, extract KPI data, and create a weekly report record in kintone for management review.

steps.action: Execute scheduled Look and retrieve results as JSON
steps.error_hint: Looker API client ID/secret are per-user. Use service account for scheduled queries

steps.action: Create weekly report record with KPI data in designated app
steps.error_hint: kintone number fields require numeric type. Convert Looker string results to numbers

steps.action: Send report notification to management group with link to kintone record
steps.error_hint: LINE WORKS bot must be registered in Developer Console. Use Bot API 2.0

goal: Post daily Metabase metrics summary to Chatwork
description: Run a Metabase question at end of business day and post formatted results to the operations Chatwork room.

steps.action: Execute saved question and retrieve daily metrics
steps.error_hint: Metabase API session token expires after 14 days by default. Implement token refresh

steps.action: Format metrics as table and post to operations room
steps.error_hint: Chatwork does not support tables natively. Use [code] tags for monospace alignment

goal: Forward HENNGE One security alerts to Slack
description: When HENNGE One detects suspicious login or policy violation, immediately alert the IT security Slack channel.

steps.action: Detect security event such as failed MFA, geo-anomaly, or unauthorized device
steps.error_hint: HENNGE One audit log API requires admin scope. Configure webhook in Access Control settings

steps.action: Post security alert with severity level and recommended action to IT channel
steps.error_hint: Use :red_circle: emoji for critical, :warning: for high severity in Slack messages

goal: Provision new Auth0 users into kintone user management app
description: When a new user is created in Auth0, automatically register them in the kintone user directory app and assign role-based permissions.

steps.action: Capture new user signup event via Auth0 Actions or webhook
steps.error_hint: Auth0 Log Streams have retry logic but no ordering guarantee. Use event_id for deduplication

steps.action: Create user record in directory app with role and department mapping
steps.error_hint: kintone API token permissions are per-app. Ensure token has record add permission

steps.action: Welcome new user in general channel and notify IT for access setup
steps.error_hint: Post to multiple channels sequentially to avoid rate limits

goal: Use Zapier as middleware to connect non-API services to kintone
description: Set up Zapier webhook to receive data from external sources and push to kintone app, with error logging to Google Sheets.

steps.action: Receive incoming webhook data and apply data transformation
steps.error_hint: Zapier webhook URL changes if you recreate the Zap. Pin the URL in config management

steps.action: Create or update record in target app based on source type
steps.error_hint: Zapier kintone integration uses subdomain.cybozu.com format. Include .cybozu.com in domain config

goal: Auto-generate financial reports from freee to Google Sheets via Make
description: Use Make (Integromat) to pull trial balance from freee monthly and populate a Google Sheets template for management reporting.

steps.action: Export trial balance and P&L for specified fiscal period
steps.error_hint: freee reports API may timeout for large datasets. Use start_date/end_date filters

steps.action: Transform financial data to match Google Sheets template format
steps.error_hint: Make scenario execution timeout is 40 minutes. For large data, split into multiple runs

steps.action: Update monthly report sheet with formatted financial data
steps.error_hint: Google Sheets API has 100 requests per 100 seconds limit. Use batch update for multiple cells

goal: Bi-directional sync between Salesforce and kintone via Make
description: Use Make to keep Salesforce accounts and kintone customer records in sync, handling conflicts with last-modified-wins strategy.

steps.action: Detect changes in either Salesforce or kintone since last sync
steps.error_hint: Make data store is used for tracking last sync. Ensure data store has sufficient records quota

steps.action: Apply kintone changes to Salesforce accounts using upsert
steps.error_hint: Salesforce composite API supports max 200 records per request. Chunk larger batches

steps.action: Apply Salesforce changes to kintone records using bulk update
steps.error_hint: kintone bulk API supports max 100 records per request. Use cursor API for large fetches

goal: Archive Yayoi accounting receipts to Box
description: Export receipt images and transaction data from Yayoi and archive them in Box organized by fiscal year and month.

steps.action: Export receipts and associated transaction metadata for archival period
steps.error_hint: Yayoi API (Misoca) has separate auth from Yayoi desktop. Ensure cloud version credentials are used

steps.action: Upload receipt files to year/month folder structure with metadata
steps.error_hint: Box folder auto-creation may fail if parent doesn't exist. Create year folder first, then month

goal: Notify Slack for freee expense report approval
description: When an expense report is submitted in freee, send approval request to the manager's Slack DM with approve/reject buttons.

steps.action: Detect new expense report submission and retrieve details
steps.error_hint: freee expense webhook requires Business plan or higher. Check subscription tier

steps.action: Send interactive approval message to manager with expense details
steps.error_hint: Slack interactive messages require a Request URL configured in app settings

steps.action: Update expense report status based on Slack button response
steps.error_hint: Slack interaction payload expires after 3 seconds for acknowledgment. Respond immediately, then process

goal: Sync Stripe refunds to MoneyForward as reversal entries
description: When a Stripe refund is processed, automatically create a corresponding reversal journal entry in MoneyForward Cloud.

steps.action: Receive charge.refunded webhook with refund details
steps.error_hint: Partial refunds send the same event type. Check refund amount vs original charge amount

steps.action: Create reversal journal entry debiting revenue and crediting the refund liability
steps.error_hint: Use 売上返品 or 返金 account. Verify account exists in MoneyForward chart of accounts first

goal: Record GMO Payment Gateway transactions in freee with notification
description: Capture GMO-PG payment completion events and record them in freee, then notify the finance team via LINE WORKS.

steps.action: Receive payment completion callback with transaction details
steps.error_hint: GMO-PG callback uses form-encoded POST, not JSON. Parse accordingly. Verify with shop password hash

steps.action: Create income transaction with GMO-PG reference number
steps.error_hint: GMO-PG settlement is batched. Record transaction date as payment date, not settlement date

steps.action: Notify finance team of large transactions exceeding threshold
steps.error_hint: LINE WORKS message API has 5000 char limit per message

goal: Manage PAY.JP subscriptions in kintone
description: Track PAY.JP subscription lifecycle events (created, renewed, cancelled) in a kintone app for customer success management.

steps.action: Receive subscription event webhook (created, renewed, cancelled, failed)
steps.error_hint: PAY.JP webhook events may be delivered out of order. Use event timestamp for ordering

steps.action: Update subscription record status in customer management app
steps.error_hint: Use kintone query API to find existing record before update. Create if not found

goal: Sync SmartHR employee master to freee HR
description: Keep employee data in sync between SmartHR (as master) and freee HR for integrated payroll processing.

steps.action: Export updated employee records since last sync timestamp
steps.error_hint: SmartHR API pagination uses cursor-based approach. Follow 'next' link in response headers

steps.action: Upsert employee records with mapped fields from SmartHR
steps.error_hint: freee HR employee number format may differ from SmartHR. Use email as secondary match key

steps.action: Report sync results to HR operations room
steps.error_hint: Include error employee names for quick troubleshooting

goal: Alert Slack when Jobcan detects attendance anomalies
description: Monitor Jobcan attendance data for late arrivals, forgotten clock-outs, and overtime alerts, then notify managers via Slack.

steps.action: Check daily attendance records for anomalies (late, missing clock-out, overtime threshold)
steps.error_hint: Jobcan API uses Basic Auth with API key. Rate limit is 100 requests per minute

steps.action: Send anomaly summary to department manager's channel
steps.error_hint: Map Jobcan department IDs to Slack channel IDs in configuration. Keep mapping updated

goal: Post KING OF TIME overtime data to freee as accrual entries
description: Calculate monthly overtime costs from KING OF TIME and create accrual journal entries in freee before payroll finalization.

steps.action: Export monthly overtime hours by employee with overtime type classification
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME classifies overtime into 法定内 and 法定外. Rates differ (1.25x vs 1.35x for 60+ hours)

steps.action: Create overtime accrual journal entry with proper account allocation
steps.error_hint: Reverse previous month's accrual before posting new one to avoid double-counting

goal: Sync social insurance procedures between OfficeStation and SmartHR
description: When employee status changes in SmartHR, automatically prepare social insurance forms in OfficeStation for e-Gov submission.

steps.action: Detect employee status change (hire, termination, address change, dependent change)
steps.error_hint: SmartHR webhook may fire before all related fields are updated. Add 5-second delay before fetching details

steps.action: Create appropriate social insurance form (取得届/喪失届/変更届) with employee data
steps.error_hint: OfficeStation form fields must match e-Gov format exactly. My Number handling requires encryption

steps.action: Notify HR team that insurance form is ready for review and submission
steps.error_hint: Never include My Number or sensitive data in notification messages

goal: Notify Slack of new Talentio interview schedules
description: When interviews are scheduled in Talentio ATS, notify interviewers via Slack and create calendar events.

steps.action: Detect new interview scheduled event with candidate and interviewer details
steps.error_hint: Talentio API is invite-only. Contact Talentio support to enable API access for your account

steps.action: Create calendar event for all interviewers with candidate details
steps.error_hint: Google Calendar API requires calendar write scope. Check service account domain-wide delegation

steps.action: DM each interviewer with interview preparation notes
steps.error_hint: Slack users.lookupByEmail may fail if interviewer uses different email. Maintain email mapping

goal: Sync talent management data between Kaonavi and SmartHR
description: Keep employee evaluation data in Kaonavi synchronized with SmartHR employee master for unified people analytics.

steps.action: Export employee evaluation scores, competency data, and career preferences
steps.error_hint: Kaonavi API rate limit is strict (30 req/min). Use bulk export endpoint for large datasets

steps.action: Update employee custom fields with evaluation summary and talent flag
steps.error_hint: SmartHR custom field groups must be created in advance. Check field group ID is correct

goal: Sync leave balances between freee HR and Jobcan
description: Synchronize paid leave (有給休暇) balances from freee HR to Jobcan attendance system for accurate leave tracking.

steps.action: Export current paid leave balances for all active employees
steps.error_hint: freee HR leave API returns balances as of the query date. Check for pending leave requests not yet reflected

steps.action: Update leave balance records for each employee
steps.error_hint: Jobcan leave types must be mapped to freee HR leave categories. 有休 vs 特別休暇 distinction matters

goal: Sync SmartHR employee data to Garoon address book
description: Keep Garoon (Cybozu) corporate address book updated with SmartHR employee master data including department and contact info.

steps.action: Export employee directory with department, position, and contact details
steps.error_hint: SmartHR may include inactive employees. Filter by employment_status = 'employed'

steps.action: Update address book entries with employee data, creating new entries as needed
steps.error_hint: Garoon address book API requires cybozu.com admin privileges. Use XML API for older Garoon versions

goal: Enrich Salesforce contacts with Sansan business card data
description: Match Salesforce contacts with Sansan scanned business cards to add latest title, department, and phone information.

steps.action: Search for business cards matching Salesforce contact email or name
steps.error_hint: Sansan API search is fuzzy. May return multiple matches for common Japanese names. Use company as secondary filter

steps.action: Update contact fields with latest business card information
steps.error_hint: Salesforce field-level security may prevent updates. Check profile permissions for target fields

goal: Auto-create Notion deal pages from Salesforce opportunities
description: When a Salesforce opportunity reaches 'Proposal' stage, create a Notion page with deal template for collaborative deal planning.

steps.action: Retrieve opportunity details and related contacts when stage reaches Proposal
steps.error_hint: Salesforce Process Builder or Flow is needed to fire webhook. Check Flow version is active

steps.action: Create deal page from template in deals database with opportunity data
steps.error_hint: Notion API has 3 requests/second rate limit. Notion page properties must match database schema exactly

steps.action: Store Notion page URL in Salesforce opportunity custom field
steps.error_hint: Custom URL field in Salesforce has 255 char limit. Notion URLs are typically under 100 chars

goal: Record LINE Pay settlements in freee accounting
description: When LINE Pay settles merchant payments, create journal entries in freee separating sales revenue from payment fees.

steps.action: Retrieve settlement report with transaction breakdown and fees
steps.error_hint: LINE Pay settlement API requires Payment API key, not Channel API key. Check key type

steps.action: Create journal entry for settlement: debit bank, credit sales, debit payment fees
steps.error_hint: LINE Pay fees include tax. Ensure fee journal entry separates fee amount and consumption tax

goal: Record Paidy BNPL transactions in MoneyForward
description: Sync Paidy buy-now-pay-later payment captures to MoneyForward as receivable entries with settlement schedule tracking.

steps.action: Receive payment capture webhook with order and settlement details
steps.error_hint: Paidy webhook requires HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. Store secret key securely

steps.action: Create receivable entry with expected settlement date
steps.error_hint: Paidy settlement is typically 2 business days after month-end. Set receivable due date accordingly

goal: Manage CloudSign contract lifecycle in kintone
description: Track CloudSign document status changes in a kintone contract management app with automatic status updates and alerts.

steps.action: Receive document status change webhook (sent, viewed, signed, completed)
steps.error_hint: CloudSign webhook requires IP whitelist configuration. Add your server IP in CloudSign admin

steps.action: Update contract record status and add timestamp for current stage
steps.error_hint: Create kintone record when document is first sent, then update on subsequent status changes

steps.action: Notify legal team of contract completion or stalled signatures
steps.error_hint: Only notify on key status changes (completed, expired) to avoid notification fatigue

goal: Update Salesforce opportunity when DocuSign contract is signed
description: When a DocuSign envelope is completed, automatically update the related Salesforce opportunity to Closed Won and store the signed document.

steps.action: Receive envelope completed webhook with signed document
steps.error_hint: DocuSign Connect webhook must be configured at account level. Ensure envelope custom fields contain Salesforce opportunity ID

steps.action: Update opportunity stage to Closed Won and attach signed contract as file
steps.error_hint: Salesforce ContentVersion API is used for file attachment. Check file size limit (2GB for API)

goal: Archive GMO Sign completed contracts in Box
description: When a GMO Sign contract is fully executed, automatically download and archive it in Box with structured metadata.

steps.action: Detect contract completion and download signed PDF with audit trail
steps.error_hint: GMO Sign API documentation is primarily in Japanese. Use agree.gmosign.com API endpoint

steps.action: Upload signed contract to designated folder with metadata template
steps.error_hint: Box metadata templates must be created in advance. Use enterprise scope for shared templates

goal: Trigger freee Sign contract from kintone approval
description: When a kintone contract request record is approved, automatically create and send the contract via freee Sign for e-signature.

steps.action: Detect approval status change on contract request app record
steps.error_hint: kintone webhook fires on all record updates. Filter for process management status change specifically

steps.action: Create contract document from template and send to counterparty for signature
steps.error_hint: freee Sign template field names must exactly match. Verify field mapping before automating

steps.action: Update contract request record with freee Sign document ID and sent timestamp
steps.error_hint: Avoid infinite webhook loops: check if update trigger field is different from the status change field

goal: Sync Shopify online and Smaregi POS inventory in real-time
description: Keep inventory counts synchronized between Shopify (online) and Smaregi (physical store) to prevent overselling.

steps.action: Receive inventory level update webhook when online order reduces stock
steps.error_hint: Shopify inventory webhooks may fire multiple times. Use idempotency key for deduplication

steps.action: Update corresponding product stock count in Smaregi POS
steps.error_hint: Smaregi product code must match Shopify SKU exactly. Standardize SKU format across both systems

goal: Record BASE EC orders in freee as sales transactions
description: Sync completed BASE online store orders to freee as sales journal entries with proper tax categorization.

steps.action: Retrieve new completed orders with item details and payment method
steps.error_hint: BASE API uses OAuth2. Access token expires in 30 days, refresh token in 60 days. Implement auto-refresh

steps.action: Create sales deals for each order with item-level tax rate classification
steps.error_hint: BASE includes shipping fee in order total. Separate shipping revenue account in freee (発送手数料)

goal: Generate Yamato B2 shipping labels from EC-CUBE orders
description: Export new EC-CUBE orders and generate Yamato Transport B2 shipping labels automatically for fulfillment.

steps.action: Export new orders pending shipment with recipient address details
steps.error_hint: EC-CUBE API varies by version (3.x vs 4.x). Confirm API endpoint format matches your version

steps.action: Register shipments and generate shipping labels with tracking numbers
steps.error_hint: Yamato B2 CSV format is strict: use Shift-JIS encoding and specific column order. UTF-8 will cause errors

steps.action: Update order status to shipped and store tracking numbers
steps.error_hint: Send shipping notification email after updating tracking. Check EC-CUBE mail template settings

goal: Generate Japan Post shipping data from Color Me Shop orders
description: Export Color Me Shop orders and register with Japan Post for shipping label generation.

steps.action: Retrieve new unshipped orders with delivery address details
steps.error_hint: Color Me API uses OAuth2. Token refresh endpoint differs from standard OAuth flow

steps.action: Register shipments and generate tracking numbers via ClickPost or WebLetter API
steps.error_hint: Japan Post API accepts only Japanese addresses in specific format. Ensure 都道府県 is separated

goal: Update Shopify fulfillment from Logiless warehouse shipping
description: When Logiless WMS marks an order as shipped, update the Shopify order fulfillment status with tracking information.

steps.action: Receive shipment completion notification with tracking details
steps.error_hint: Logiless webhook payload uses internal order ID. Map to Shopify order number via reference field

steps.action: Create fulfillment on Shopify order with tracking number and carrier
steps.error_hint: Shopify Fulfillment API v2024-01+ requires fulfillment order ID, not just order ID. Migrate to new API

goal: Create Backlog issues from Slack bug reports
description: Allow team members to create Backlog bug tickets directly from Slack using a slash command or reaction.

steps.action: Capture bug report via slash command or bug emoji reaction with message content
steps.error_hint: Slack Events API requires URL verification challenge response. Implement /slack/events endpoint

steps.action: Create bug issue with priority, description, and Slack thread link
steps.error_hint: Backlog API uses API key or OAuth2. API key is simpler but tied to a single user. Use OAuth2 for team

steps.action: Reply in thread with Backlog issue link and assigned developer
steps.error_hint: Thread reply requires both channel and thread_ts. Ensure original message ts is captured

goal: Bridge kintone project records to Asana tasks
description: When a kintone project management record is created, automatically create a corresponding Asana task with subtasks for the cross-team workflow.

steps.action: Detect new project record creation with task breakdown
steps.error_hint: kintone webhook payload does not include subtable data. Fetch full record via API after webhook trigger

steps.action: Create task in project with subtasks and deadline
steps.error_hint: Asana API returns task GID as string. Store as text field in kintone, not number

steps.action: Store Asana task link back in kintone record
steps.error_hint: Use kintone record update API with revision check to prevent concurrent edit conflicts

goal: Alert Slack on Google Analytics traffic anomalies
description: Monitor Google Analytics for unusual traffic spikes or drops and alert the marketing team in Slack.

steps.action: Compare current hour's sessions against rolling average to detect anomalies
steps.error_hint: GA4 Data API has quota of 10,000 requests per day per project. Cache results to minimize API calls

steps.action: Post traffic anomaly alert with comparison chart data
steps.error_hint: Only alert if anomaly exceeds threshold to avoid alert fatigue. Default threshold: 50% deviation

goal: Sync Treasure Data segments to Looker for visualization
description: Export Treasure Data audience segments and make them available in Looker dashboards for business intelligence reporting.

steps.action: Run scheduled query to export audience segment data
steps.error_hint: Treasure Data query may take minutes for large datasets. Use Presto for faster interactive queries, Hive for batch

steps.action: Trigger PDT (Persistent Derived Table) rebuild to refresh segment data
steps.error_hint: Looker PDT rebuild can be slow. Use datagroups for smart caching instead of forced rebuild

steps.action: Notify analytics team that segment data has been refreshed

input_mapping.message: Segment data refreshed: {{row_count}} records updated in Looker

steps.error_hint: Include Looker dashboard link in notification for quick access

goal: Embed Tableau dashboard data in kintone records
description: Pull key metrics from Tableau views and populate kintone dashboard app for users without Tableau licenses.

steps.action: Query view data via REST API for specified dashboard metrics
steps.error_hint: Tableau REST API returns data in pages of 10,000 rows. Implement pagination for large views

steps.action: Update or create dashboard summary records with latest metrics
steps.error_hint: kintone graph/chart features can visualize the data. Configure app views for visual display

goal: Generate Notion monthly reports from Metabase queries
description: Run Metabase monthly KPI queries and auto-generate a formatted report page in Notion for management review.

steps.action: Execute monthly KPI dashboard questions and retrieve results
steps.error_hint: Metabase dashboard API returns all card results. Filter for specific question IDs if needed

steps.action: Create monthly report page with KPI data formatted as tables and callouts
steps.error_hint: Notion API block append has 100 blocks per request limit. Split large reports into multiple API calls

steps.action: Share report link with management team channel
steps.error_hint: Notion page must be shared with appropriate workspace members for link to work

goal: Mirror Zendesk tickets to kintone for cross-team visibility
description: Replicate Zendesk support tickets into a kintone app so non-support teams can track customer issues without Zendesk licenses.

steps.action: Capture new ticket creation and status updates via webhook
steps.error_hint: Zendesk triggers fire on specific conditions. Create trigger for 'ticket is created' and 'ticket is updated'

steps.action: Create or update ticket mirror record with current status and tags
steps.error_hint: Use kintone's update-by-query with Zendesk ticket ID as key to handle create vs update logic

goal: Alert Slack when VIP customers contact Intercom support
description: When a tagged VIP customer initiates an Intercom conversation, immediately alert the account management team in Slack.

steps.action: Detect new conversation from user tagged as VIP or enterprise tier
steps.error_hint: Intercom webhook topic must include 'conversation.user.created'. Filter by user tag in handler

steps.action: Post VIP alert to account management channel with customer context and direct Intercom link
steps.error_hint: Include @channel mention for VIP alerts. Ensure Slack app has chat:write permission

goal: Escalate Channel Talk conversations to Zendesk tickets
description: When a Channel Talk conversation requires advanced support, create a Zendesk ticket with full conversation context.

steps.action: Capture conversation tagged for escalation with full message history
steps.error_hint: Channel Talk message export includes both user and operator messages. Format appropriately for Zendesk

steps.action: Create ticket with conversation history as first comment and set priority based on tags
steps.error_hint: Zendesk requester is auto-created if email doesn't exist. May create duplicate users if email format differs

steps.action: Add internal note with Zendesk ticket link and close Channel Talk conversation
steps.error_hint: Channel Talk conversation close requires manager or admin role for the operator

goal: Store HENNGE One access logs in kintone for compliance
description: Periodically export HENNGE One access and authentication logs to a kintone app for IT compliance auditing.

steps.action: Export access logs for specified time period with user and device details
steps.error_hint: HENNGE One log retention period depends on plan. Enterprise plan keeps 1 year. Export before expiry

steps.action: Bulk insert access log records to compliance audit app
steps.error_hint: kintone bulk add API supports max 100 records per request. Loop for larger log volumes

goal: Provision Auth0 users with HENNGE One SSO access
description: When a new user is created in Auth0, automatically configure their HENNGE One SSO profile for seamless corporate app access.

steps.action: Capture new user creation event with role and department metadata
steps.error_hint: Auth0 Actions post-registration hook is more reliable than Rules for new user events

steps.action: Create user profile with department-based access policy assignment
steps.error_hint: HENNGE One user provisioning API may require SCIM endpoint configuration. Check admin settings

steps.action: Notify IT team of new user SSO setup completion
steps.error_hint: Do not include sensitive access policy details in Slack messages. Use generic policy name only

goal: Post 1Password security audit findings to Slack
description: Run 1Password Business security assessment and post findings (weak passwords, reused credentials, inactive users) to the IT security channel.

steps.action: Retrieve security audit report including Watchtower alerts and user activity
steps.error_hint: 1Password Events API requires Connect server setup. Ensure Connect server is running and accessible

steps.action: Post security summary to IT channel with actionable recommendations
steps.error_hint: Never include actual passwords or vault item details in Slack. Only share aggregate counts and categories

goal: Backup Slack files to Google Drive via Zapier
description: Use Zapier to monitor Slack channels for shared files and automatically archive them to a Google Drive folder.

steps.action: Monitor Slack file_shared events and trigger file download
steps.error_hint: Zapier Slack trigger for files requires files:read scope. Check Zapier Slack connection permissions

steps.action: Upload file to designated backup folder with original filename and metadata
steps.error_hint: Google Drive storage quota applies. Monitor usage and alert before hitting limit

goal: Sync HubSpot deals to kintone via Make for local team access
description: Use Make to replicate HubSpot CRM deals to a kintone app, enabling Japanese field teams without HubSpot licenses to view deal progress.

steps.action: Watch for HubSpot deal stage changes and retrieve deal properties
steps.error_hint: Make HubSpot module uses v3 API. Ensure API key is replaced with private app token (API keys deprecated)

steps.action: Upsert deal record in CRM app with HubSpot deal ID as unique key
steps.error_hint: Make kintone module requires subdomain without .cybozu.com. Common misconfiguration

goal: Route Datadog alerts to Slack with incident management workflow
description: When Datadog detects a service anomaly, post structured alert to Slack and create incident channel for response coordination.

steps.action: Receive monitor alert webhook with service, metric, and severity details
steps.error_hint: Datadog webhook payload uses template variables like $EVENT_MSG. Configure webhook payload format in Datadog

steps.action: Create incident channel and post alert details with runbook link
steps.error_hint: Slack channel names must be lowercase, max 80 chars, no spaces. Sanitize service name

steps.action: Notify on-call engineers and post to main alerts channel with incident channel link
steps.error_hint: Slack usergroup mention requires usergroups:read scope. Use @oncall-team handle format

goal: Send LINE confirmation for TableCheck restaurant reservations
description: When a reservation is made on TableCheck, send confirmation message via LINE with reservation details and cancellation link.

steps.action: Receive reservation created webhook with guest and booking details
steps.error_hint: TableCheck webhook requires API partner agreement. Contact TableCheck for API access

steps.action: Send flex message with reservation confirmation, map link, and cancel button
steps.error_hint: LINE Flex Messages have complex JSON structure. Use LINE Flex Message Simulator for testing

goal: Create Slack onboarding checklist from SmartHR new hire data
description: When SmartHR registers a new employee, auto-generate a personalized onboarding checklist in a dedicated Slack channel.

steps.action: Detect new employee registration with department and role details
steps.error_hint: SmartHR webhook fires when employee status changes to 在籍. Check employment_type for part-time vs full-time

steps.action: Create dedicated onboarding channel and post department-specific checklist
steps.error_hint: Slack channel name max 80 chars, lowercase, no spaces. Replace Japanese characters with romaji

steps.action: Invite HR team, manager, and buddy to the onboarding channel
steps.error_hint: Slack conversations.invite requires the bot to be in the channel first. Join channel before inviting others

goal: Report KING OF TIME overtime data to SmartHR for compliance
description: Extract overtime records from KING OF TIME and push to SmartHR for 36 Agreement (三六協定) compliance monitoring.

steps.action: Export monthly overtime hours by employee with classification breakdown
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME overtime API returns hours in decimal format (e.g., 2.5 = 2h30m). Convert if needed

steps.action: Update employee overtime tracking custom fields for 36 Agreement monitoring
steps.error_hint: SmartHR custom field for overtime must be number type. 36 Agreement limit is 45h/month, 360h/year standard

steps.action: Alert HR if any employee approaches 36 Agreement overtime limit
steps.error_hint: Include both monthly and cumulative yearly hours in alert for full compliance picture

goal: Approve rakumo workflow requests from Slack
description: When a rakumo workflow request is pending approval, send interactive Slack message for quick approve/reject without logging into rakumo.

steps.action: Detect new approval request pending for the user
steps.error_hint: rakumo API availability depends on Google Workspace integration. Ensure rakumo admin has enabled API access

steps.action: Send interactive approval message with request summary and approve/reject buttons
steps.error_hint: Slack interactive message callback URL must handle rakumo approval API call within 3 seconds

steps.action: Submit approval or rejection based on Slack button interaction
steps.error_hint: rakumo approval may require comment field. Include optional comment dialog in Slack interaction

goal: Auto-save Otter.ai meeting transcriptions to Notion
description: When an Otter.ai meeting transcription is completed, create a Notion page with the transcript, summary, and action items.

steps.action: Receive completed transcription with summary and action items
steps.error_hint: Otter API is available for Business plan only. Webhook URL must be configured in Otter admin

steps.action: Create meeting notes page in team database with transcript, summary, and action items
steps.error_hint: Notion page body blocks have 2000 character limit per block. Split long transcripts into multiple blocks

steps.action: Share meeting notes link with participants in their Slack DMs
steps.error_hint: Match Otter participant emails to Slack users via users.lookupByEmail API

goal: Create Backlog development issues from Salesforce cases
description: When a Salesforce support case requires development work, automatically create a linked Backlog issue for the engineering team.

steps.action: Detect case status change to 'Development Required' with case details
steps.error_hint: Salesforce case assignment rules may override status. Check process builder order of operations

steps.action: Create issue with case details, customer impact, and priority mapping
steps.error_hint: Backlog priority IDs: 2=High, 3=Normal, 4=Low. Map from Salesforce priority values

steps.action: Update case with Backlog issue key for tracking
steps.error_hint: Store Backlog issue URL in Salesforce custom URL field for one-click navigation

goal: Log Twilio call records to Salesforce activities
description: After a Twilio call ends, create a Salesforce activity record with call details, recording link, and associate with the matching contact.

steps.action: Receive call completion status callback with duration and recording URL
steps.error_hint: Twilio status callback URL must be publicly accessible. Use ngrok for development testing

steps.action: Find contact by phone number and create task/activity with call details
steps.error_hint: Japanese phone numbers may be stored with or without country code (+81). Search both formats

goal: Send LINE order status updates to Shopify customers
description: When a Shopify order status changes (confirmed, shipped, delivered), send update notifications to customers via LINE.

steps.action: Receive order update webhook with status change and customer details
steps.error_hint: Shopify order webhooks fire for any update. Filter by fulfillment_status change to avoid noise

steps.action: Send order status flex message with tracking link to customer's LINE
steps.error_hint: LINE user ID must be collected via LINE Login during Shopify checkout. Not all customers will have LINE ID

goal: Build freee invoice tracking dashboard in kintone
description: Sync freee invoice data to kintone for creating visual dashboards tracking payment status, aging, and client breakdown.

steps.action: Export all invoices with payment status for current and previous month
steps.error_hint: freee invoices API returns max 100 per page. Use offset parameter for pagination

steps.action: Bulk upsert invoice records using freee invoice ID as unique key
steps.error_hint: kintone does not have native upsert. Query existing records first, then add or update accordingly

steps.action: Post daily invoice aging summary to finance channel
steps.error_hint: Calculate aging buckets (30/60/90 days) before posting for actionable reporting

goal: Distribute SmartHR announcements via LINE WORKS
description: When HR publishes a new announcement or policy change in SmartHR, automatically distribute it to all employees via LINE WORKS.

steps.action: Detect new HR announcement publication
steps.error_hint: SmartHR announcements API may require custom webhook setup via SmartHR Plus

steps.action: Post announcement to department groups or all-company channel
steps.error_hint: LINE WORKS message API has rate limits per bot. Distribute to groups sequentially with delay

goal: Generate NDA from freee partner data and send via CloudSign
description: Pull partner company data from freee, generate an NDA from template, and send for e-signature via CloudSign.

steps.action: Retrieve partner company details (name, address, representative) from freee contacts
steps.error_hint: freee partner API uses company_id scope. Ensure OAuth token belongs to correct company

steps.action: Create NDA document from template with partner details filled in
steps.error_hint: CloudSign template placeholders must exactly match field names. Test with draft mode first

steps.action: Notify legal team that NDA has been sent for review

input_mapping.message: NDA sent to {{partner_name}} via CloudSign. Doc ID: {{document_id}}

steps.error_hint: Include CloudSign document status link for easy tracking
